rendered_text: 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.
notes: W1+W2 struct-collapse regression check. Opened github.com/copilot, hard-reloaded (Ctrl+Shift+R) to a fresh New chat, submitted PII prompt '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567'. Within the 60s window the assistant turn rendered the canonical PII block warning with a warning icon: '민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' — expected_text '차단' present. The LLM was prevented from emitting a normal reply (only the block message appeared), consistent with engine intercept firing. Chat-bubble injection (replace-stream) pattern, same as character.ai (#1127). W1 dead-field removal + W2 cached_*→extracted_kv migration did NOT regress PII warning rendering on github_copilot. Baseline OK.
